fn _process_initialize_mint(
    accounts: &[AccountInfo],
    decimals: u8,
    mint_authority: &Pubkey,
    freeze_authority: PodCOption<Pubkey>,
    rent_sysvar_account: bool,
) -> ProgramResult {
    let mint_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    check_program_account(mint_info.owner)?;

    if !rent.is_exempt(mint_info.lamports(), mint_data_len) {
        return Err(TokenError::NotRentExempt.into());
    }

    let mut mint = PodStateWithExtensionsMut::<PodMint>::unpack_uninitialized(&mut mint_data)?;
    let extension_types = mint.get_extension_types()?;
    if ExtensionType::try_calculate_account_len::<Mint>(&extension_types)? != mint_data_len {
        return Err(ProgramError::InvalidAccountData);
    }
    ExtensionType::check_for_invalid_mint_extension_combinations(&extension_types)?;

    if let Ok(default_account_state) = mint.get_extension_mut::<DefaultAccountState>() {
        let state = AccountState::try_from(default_account_state.state)
            .or(Err(ProgramError::InvalidAccountData))?;
        if state == AccountState::Frozen && freeze_authority.is_none() {
            return Err(TokenError::MintCannotFreeze.into());
        }
    }

    mint.base.mint_authority = PodCOption::some(*mint_authority);
    mint.base.decimals = decimals;
    mint.base.is_initialized = PodBool::from_bool(true);
    mint.base.freeze_authority = freeze_authority;
    mint.init_account_type()?;
    Ok(())

fn _process_initialize_account(
    accounts: &[AccountInfo],
    owner: Option<&Pubkey>,
    rent_sysvar_account: bool,
) -> ProgramResult {
    let new_account_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    let mint_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;

    check_program_account(new_account_info.owner)?;
    check_program_account(mint_info.owner)?;

    if !rent.is_exempt(new_account_info.lamports(), new_account_info_data_len) {
        return Err(TokenError::NotRentExempt.into());
    }

    let mint_data = mint_info.data.borrow();
    let mint = PodStateWithExtensions::<PodMint>::unpack(&mint_data)
        .map_err(|_| Into::<ProgramError>::into(TokenError::InvalidMint))?;

    let required_extensions =
        Self::get_required_account_extensions_from_unpacked_mint(mint_info.owner, &mint)?;
    if ExtensionType::try_calculate_account_len::<Account>(&required_extensions)?
        > new_account_info_data_len
    {
        return Err(ProgramError::InvalidAccountData);
    }

    let starting_state =
        if let Ok(default_account_state) = mint.get_extension::<DefaultAccountState>() {
            AccountState::try_from(default_account_state.state)
                .or(Err(ProgramError::InvalidAccountData))?
        } else {
            AccountState::Initialized
        };

    account.base.mint = *mint_info.key;
    account.base.owner = *owner;
    account.base.state = starting_state.into();

    if mint_info.key == &native_mint::id() {
        account.base.amount = new_account_info.lamports()
            .checked_sub(rent_exempt_reserve)
            .ok_or(TokenError::Overflow)?
            .into();
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V4 - Input Validation - MITIGATED
Dual program ownership check (account and mint), rent exemption, mint validity verification, extension requirements derived from mint, default account state handling, and checked arithmetic for native mint.<|eot_id|>

fn stake_split<'a>(
    pool_account_key: &Pubkey,
    stake_account: AccountInfo<'a>,
    authority: AccountInfo<'a>,
    bump_seed: u8,
    amount: u64,
    split_stake: AccountInfo<'a>,
) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
    let authority_seeds = &[POOL_STAKE_AUTHORITY_PREFIX, pool_account_key.as_ref(), &[bump_seed]];
    let signers = &[&authority_seeds[..]];

    let split_instruction =
        stake::instruction::split(stake_account.key, authority.key, amount, split_stake.key);

    invoke_signed(
        split_instruction.last().unwrap(),
        &[stake_account, split_stake, authority],
        signers,
    )
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

VULNERABLE
V6 - Unchecked External Calls
MEDIUM
The .last().unwrap() on the split instruction vector can panic if the vector is empty. While stake::instruction::split is unlikely to return an empty vector in practice, using unwrap instead of proper error handling is a vulnerability pattern. Should use .last().ok_or(ProgramError::...)? instead.<|eot_id|>
label: VULNERABLE

source_info.extraction_method: direct extraction - .last().unwrap() on instruction vector (L409) is a code smell that panics if vector is empty

fn check_pool_pda(
    program_id: &Pubkey,
    base_address: &Pubkey,
    check_address: &Pubkey,
    pda_lookup_fn: &dyn Fn(&Pubkey, &Pubkey) -> (Pubkey, u8),
    pda_name: &str,
    pool_error: SinglePoolError,
) -> Result<u8, ProgramError> {
    let (derived_address, bump_seed) = pda_lookup_fn(program_id, base_address);
    if *check_address != derived_address {
        msg!("Incorrect {} address for base {}: expected {}, received {}",
            pda_name, base_address, derived_address, check_address);
        Err(pool_error.into())
    } else {
        Ok(bump_seed)
    }
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

pub fn process_transfer(
    program_id: &Pubkey,
    accounts: &[AccountInfo],
    amount: u64,
) -> ProgramResult {
    check_program_account(source_account_info.owner)?;
    check_program_account(destination_account_info.owner)?;

    let source_account = PodStateWithExtensionsMut::<PodAccount>::unpack(&mut source_account_data)?;
    if source_account.base.is_frozen() {
        return Err(TokenError::AccountFrozen.into());
    }

    if let Ok(cpi_guard) = source_account.get_extension::<CpiGuard>() {
        if *authority_info.key == source_account.base.owner
            && cpi_guard.lock_cpi.into() && in_cpi()
        {
            return Err(TokenError::CpiGuardTransferBlocked.into());
        }
    }

    match (source_account.base.delegate, maybe_permanent_delegate) {
        (_, Some(ref delegate)) if authority_info.key == delegate =>
            Self::validate_owner(program_id, delegate, authority_info,
                authority_info_data_len, account_info_iter.as_slice())?,
        (PodCOption { option: PodCOption::<Pubkey>::SOME, value: delegate }, _)
            if authority_info.key == &delegate => {
            Self::validate_owner(program_id, &delegate, authority_info,
                authority_info_data_len, account_info_iter.as_slice())?;
            if u64::from(source_account.base.delegated_amount) < amount {
                return Err(TokenError::InsufficientFunds.into());
            }
            source_account.base.delegated_amount = u64::from(source_account.base.delegated_amount)
                .checked_sub(amount).ok_or(TokenError::Overflow)?.into();
        }
        _ => Self::validate_owner(program_id, &source_account.base.owner,
            authority_info, authority_info_data_len, account_info_iter.as_slice())?,
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V1 - Access Control - MITIGATED
Three-way authority validation: permanent delegate, account delegate, and owner — each with validate_owner. CPI guard adds extra protection against unauthorized CPI-based transfers. Frozen account check prevents transfers from frozen accounts.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept validate_owner for all three authority paths (permanent delegate L458-464, delegate L472-491, owner L494-500), CPI guard (L445-456), frozen check (L358-360)

fn process_update_pool_token_metadata(
    program_id: &Pubkey,

    uri: String,
) -> ProgramResult {
    check_vote_account(vote_account_info)?;

    let pool = SinglePool::from_account_info(pool_info, program_id)?;
    if pool.vote_account_address != *vote_account_info.key {
        return Err(SinglePoolError::InvalidPoolAccount.into());
    }

    let vote_account_data = &vote_account_info.try_borrow_data()?;
    let vote_account_withdrawer = vote_account_data
        .get(VOTE_STATE_AUTHORIZED_WITHDRAWER_START..VOTE_STATE_AUTHORIZED_WITHDRAWER_END)
        .and_then(|x| Pubkey::try_from(x).ok())
        .ok_or(SinglePoolError::UnparseableVoteAccount)?;

    if *authorized_withdrawer_info.key != vote_account_withdrawer {
        return Err(SinglePoolError::InvalidMetadataSigner.into());
    }
    if !authorized_withdrawer_info.is_signer {
        return Err(SinglePoolError::SignatureMissing.into());
    }

    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

) -> ProgramResult {

    let maker_src_account = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    let maker_src_mint = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    let taker_src_mint = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    let transfer_authority = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;

    let seeds = &[

        maker_wallet.key.as_ref(),
        maker_src_mint.key.as_ref(),
        taker_src_mint.key.as_ref(),
        &maker_size.to_le_bytes(),
        &taker_size.to_le_bytes(),
        &[bump_seed],
    ];

    let authority_key = Pubkey::create_program_address(seeds, program_id)?;
    assert_keys_equal(authority_key, *transfer_authority.key)?;

    invoke_signed(
        &spl_token::instruction::transfer(
            token_program_info.key, maker_src_account.key,
            taker_dst_account.key, transfer_authority.key, &[], maker_size,
        )?,

pub fn process_trade(
    program_id: &Pubkey,
    accounts: &[AccountInfo],
    size: u64,
    buy_price: u64,
    sell_price: u64,
) -> ProgramResult {
    let n = size;
    let n_b = buyer_short_token_account.amount;
    let n_s = seller_long_token_account.amount;

    let total_price = buy_price
        .checked_add(sell_price)
        .ok_or(BinaryOptionError::TradePricesIncorrect)?;
    if total_price != u64::pow(10, binary_option.decimals as u32) {
        return Err(BinaryOptionError::TradePricesIncorrect.into());
    }

    // Case 1: both reducing positions
    spl_token_transfer_signed(token_program_info, escrow_account_info,
        buyer_account_info, authority_info, n * sell_price, seeds)?;
    spl_token_transfer_signed(token_program_info, escrow_account_info,
        seller_account_info, authority_info, n * buy_price, seeds)?;

    binary_option.decrement_supply(n)?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

V8 - Integer Overflow
HIGH
The expressions n * sell_price and n * buy_price use unchecked u64 multiplication. While total_price is validated with checked_add, the product of size and price is not. For large trade sizes with non-trivial prices, these can silently overflow, causing incorrect escrow transfers.<|eot_id|>

pub fn process_collect(program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo]) -> ProgramResult {
    let collector_long_token_account: Account = assert_initialized(collector_long_token_account_info)?;
    let collector_short_token_account: Account = assert_initialized(collector_short_token_account_info)?;
    let escrow_account: Account = assert_initialized(escrow_account_info)?;
    let binary_option = BinaryOption::try_from_slice(&binary_option_account_info.data.borrow_mut())?;

    if !binary_option.settled {
        return Err(BinaryOptionError::BetNotSettled.into());
    }

    let reward = if collector_long_token_account.mint == binary_option.winning_side_pubkey {
        collector_long_token_account.amount
    } else if collector_short_token_account.mint == binary_option.winning_side_pubkey {
        collector_short_token_account.amount
    } else {
        return Err(BinaryOptionError::TokenNotFoundInPool.into());
    };

    if reward > 0 {
        let amount = reward
            .checked_mul(escrow_account.amount)
            .ok_or(BinaryOptionError::AmountOverflow)?;
        let amount = amount / binary_option.circulation;
        spl_token_transfer_signed(token_program_info, escrow_account_info,
            collector_account_info, escrow_authority_info, amount, seeds)?;
        binary_option.decrement_supply(reward)?;
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V8 - Integer Overflow - MITIGATED
checked_mul prevents overflow in reward * escrow_amount calculation. Note: the subsequent division by circulation is unchecked but cannot overflow since division only reduces values. Settled check prevents premature collection.<|eot_id|>

        NameRecordHeader::unpack_from_slice(&name_account.data.borrow())?;

    let is_parent_owner = if let Some(parent_name) = parent_name {
        if name_record_header.parent_name != *parent_name.key {
            return Err(ProgramError::InvalidArgument);
        }
        let parent_header = NameRecordHeader::unpack_from_slice(&parent_name.data.borrow())?;
        parent_header.owner == *name_owner.key
    } else {
        false
    };

    if !name_owner.is_signer
        || (name_record_header.owner != *name_owner.key && !is_parent_owner)

pub fn process_settle(_program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo]) -> ProgramResult {
    let binary_option_account_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    let winning_mint_account_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    let pool_owner_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;

    let mut binary_option =
        BinaryOption::try_from_slice(&binary_option_account_info.data.borrow_mut())?;

    if !pool_owner_info.is_signer {
        return Err(ProgramError::MissingRequiredSignature);
    }
    if binary_option.settled {
        return Err(BinaryOptionError::AlreadySettled.into());
    }
    assert_keys_equal(*pool_owner_info.key, binary_option.owner)?;

    if *winning_mint_account_info.key == binary_option.long_mint_account_pubkey
        || *winning_mint_account_info.key == binary_option.short_mint_account_pubkey
    {
        binary_option.winning_side_pubkey = *winning_mint_account_info.key;
    } else {
        return Err(BinaryOptionError::InvalidWinner.into());
    }
    binary_option.settled = true;
    Ok(())

fn process_realloc(accounts: &[AccountInfo], space: u32) -> ProgramResult {
    let system_program = next_account_info(accounts_iter)?;
    let payer_account = next_account_info(accounts_iter)?;
    let name_account = next_account_info(accounts_iter)?;
    let name_owner = next_account_info(accounts_iter)?;

    let name_record_header = NameRecordHeader::unpack_from_slice(&name_account.data.borrow())?;

    if !name_owner.is_signer || name_record_header.owner != *name_owner.key {
        return Err(ProgramError::InvalidArgument);
    }

    let new_space = NameRecordHeader::LEN.saturating_add(space as usize);
    let required_lamports = Rent::get()?.minimum_balance(new_space);

    match name_account.lamports().cmp(&required_lamports) {
        Ordering::Less => {
            let lamports_to_add = required_lamports - name_account.lamports();
            invoke(&system_instruction::transfer(
                payer_account.key, name_account.key, lamports_to_add),
                &[payer_account.clone(), name_account.clone(), system_program.clone()])?;
        }
        Ordering::Greater => {
            let lamports_to_remove = name_account.lamports() - required_lamports;
            let source_amount: &mut u64 = &mut name_account.lamports.borrow_mut();
            let dest_amount: &mut u64 = &mut payer_account.lamports.borrow_mut();
            *source_amount = source_amount.saturating_sub(lamports_to_remove);
            *dest_amount = dest_amount.saturating_add(lamports_to_remove);
        }
        Ordering::Equal => {}
    }
    name_account.realloc(new_space, false)?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V10 - Denial of Service - MITIGATED
Owner+signer check prevents unauthorized reallocation. Rent calculation ensures account remains rent-exempt. Bidirectional lamport adjustment handles both growth and shrinkage. saturating_add/sub prevents overflow in lamport transfers. realloc enforces max data increase limit.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: direct extraction

pub fn process_trade(
    program_id: &Pubkey,
    accounts: &[AccountInfo],
    size: u64,
    buy_price: u64,
    sell_price: u64,
) -> ProgramResult {
    let n = size;
    let n_b = buyer_short_token_account.amount;
    let n_s = seller_long_token_account.amount;

    // Case 1: Both reducing positions (n_b >= n && n_s >= n)
    // FIRST: Burn tokens (destroys positions)
    spl_burn(token_program_info, buyer_short_token_account_info,
        short_token_mint_info, buyer_info, n)?;
    spl_burn(token_program_info, seller_long_token_account_info,
        long_token_mint_info, seller_info, n)?;

    // THEN: Transfer escrow funds back
    spl_token_transfer_signed(token_program_info, escrow_account_info,
        buyer_account_info, authority_info, n * sell_price, seeds)?;
    spl_token_transfer_signed(token_program_info, escrow_account_info,
        seller_account_info, authority_info, n * buy_price, seeds)?;

    binary_option.decrement_supply(n)?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks - MITIGATED
Correct CEI pattern: tokens are burned FIRST (destroying the buyer's short and seller's long positions), THEN escrow funds are released. Any reentrancy during transfer would fail because positions are already burned.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept Case 1 burn-then-transfer ordering: burns (L312-325) execute before escrow transfers (L326-341)

fn process_accept_offer(
    program_id: &Pubkey,
    accounts: &[AccountInfo],
    maker_size: u64,
    taker_size: u64,
) -> ProgramResult {
    let maker_src_token_account = spl_token::state::Account::unpack(&maker_src_account.data.borrow())?;

    if maker_src_token_account.delegated_amount != maker_pay_size {
        return Err(ProgramError::InvalidAccountData);
    }
    if maker_src_token_account.delegate != COption::Some(authority_key) {
        return Err(ProgramError::InvalidAccountData);
    }

    // FIRST: Transfer from maker to taker (uses PDA delegate)
    invoke_signed(
        &spl_token::instruction::transfer(
            token_program_info.key, maker_src_account.key,
            taker_dst_account.key, transfer_authority.key, &[], maker_pay_size,
        )?,
        &[maker_src_account.clone(), taker_dst_account.clone(),
          transfer_authority.clone(), token_program_info.clone()],
        &[seeds],
    )?;

    // THEN: Transfer from taker to maker (taker signs directly)
    invoke(
        &spl_token::instruction::transfer(
            token_program_info.key, taker_src_account.key,
            maker_dst_account.key, taker_wallet.key, &[], taker_pay_size,
        )?,
        &[taker_src_account.clone(), maker_dst_account.clone(),
          taker_wallet.clone(), token_program_info.clone()],
    )?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks - MITIGATED
Delegation amount is validated to exactly match maker_pay_size, preventing partial-fill attacks. The PDA-delegated transfer from maker consumes the entire delegation in one atomic step. After maker-to-taker completes, taker-to-maker executes. Reentrancy during second transfer cannot re-use the delegation.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept delegation validation (L195-204), maker-to-taker transfer via PDA (L213-229), taker-to-maker transfer (L253-268)

pub fn process_execute_transaction(program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo]) -> ProgramResult {
    let mut signers_seeds: Vec<&[&[u8]]> = vec![];

    // Sign using governance PDA
    let mut governance_seeds = governance_data.get_governance_address_seeds()?.to_vec();
    let (_, bump_seed) = Pubkey::find_program_address(&governance_seeds, program_id);
    let bump = &[bump_seed];
    governance_seeds.push(bump);
    signers_seeds.push(&governance_seeds[..]);

    // Sign using treasury PDA if needed
    let mut treasury_seeds = get_native_treasury_address_seeds(governance_info.key).to_vec();
    let (treasury_address, treasury_bump_seed) =
        Pubkey::find_program_address(&treasury_seeds, program_id);
    let treasury_bump = &[treasury_bump_seed];

    if instruction_account_infos.iter().any(|a| a.key == &treasury_address) {
        treasury_seeds.push(treasury_bump);
        signers_seeds.push(&treasury_seeds[..]);
    }

    for instruction in instructions {
        invoke_signed(&instruction, instruction_account_infos, &signers_seeds[..])?;
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE

Dual PDA signing with find_program_address for both governance and treasury. Canonical bumps derived at runtime. Treasury PDA only added to signers when required by the instruction accounts.<|eot_id|>

pub fn process_set_realm_authority(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
    action: SetRealmAuthorityAction,
) -> ProgramResult {
    let realm_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    let realm_authority_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;

    let mut realm_data = get_realm_data_for_authority(
        program_id, realm_info, realm_authority_info.key)?;

    if !realm_authority_info.is_signer {
        return Err(GovernanceError::RealmAuthorityMustSign.into());
    }

    let new_realm_authority = match action {
        SetRealmAuthorityAction::SetChecked => {
            let new_authority_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
            assert_governance_for_realm(program_id, new_authority_info, realm_info.key)?;
            Some(*new_authority_info.key)
        }
        SetRealmAuthorityAction::SetUnchecked => {
            Some(*next_account_info(account_info_iter)?.key)
        }
        SetRealmAuthorityAction::Remove => None,
    };

    realm_data.authority = new_realm_authority;
    realm_data.serialize(&mut realm_info.data.borrow_mut()[..])?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

fn process_tally(program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo]) -> ProgramResult {
    let feature_proposal_state =
        FeatureProposal::unpack_from_slice(&feature_proposal_info.data.borrow())?;

    match feature_proposal_state {
        FeatureProposal::Pending(acceptance_criteria) => {
            let (acceptance_token_address) = get_acceptance_token_address(feature_proposal_info.key);
            if acceptance_token_address != *acceptance_token_info.key {
                return Err(ProgramError::InvalidArgument);
            }
            let (feature_id_address, feature_id_bump_seed) =
                get_feature_id_address_with_seed(feature_proposal_info.key);
            if feature_id_address != *feature_id_info.key {
                return Err(ProgramError::InvalidArgument);
            }

            if clock.unix_timestamp >= acceptance_criteria.deadline {
                FeatureProposal::Expired.pack_into_slice(&mut feature_proposal_info.data.borrow_mut());
                return Ok(());
            }

            let acceptance_token = spl_token::state::Account::unpack(&acceptance_token_info.data.borrow())?;
            if acceptance_token.amount < acceptance_criteria.tokens_required {
                return Ok(());
            }

            invoke_signed(
                &system_instruction::assign(feature_id_info.key, &feature::id()),
                &[feature_id_info.clone(), system_program_info.clone()],
                &[feature_id_signer_seeds],
            )?;

            FeatureProposal::Accepted { tokens_upon_acceptance: acceptance_token.amount }
                .pack_into_slice(&mut feature_proposal_info.data.borrow_mut());
        }
        _ => return Err(ProgramError::InvalidAccountData),
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V6 - Unchecked External Calls - MITIGATED
invoke_signed with ? for feature assignment. PDA addresses re-derived and verified. Deadline and threshold checked before any CPI. State correctly transitions to Accepted only after successful assignment.<|eot_id|>

    let feature_proposal_state =
        FeatureProposal::unpack_from_slice(&feature_proposal_info.data.borrow())?;

    match feature_proposal_state {

            if clock.unix_timestamp >= acceptance_criteria.deadline {

            if acceptance_token.amount < acceptance_criteria.tokens_required {

                &system_instruction::assign(feature_id_info.key, &feature::id()),
                &[feature_id_info.clone(), system_program_info.clone()],
                &[feature_id_signer_seeds],
            )?;
            FeatureProposal::Accepted { tokens_upon_acceptance: acceptance_token.amount }
                .pack_into_slice(&mut feature_proposal_info.data.borrow_mut());
        }
        _ => return Err(ProgramError::InvalidAccountData),

    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

fn process_exchange(program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo]) -> ProgramResult {
    let (token_amount, decimals) = {
        let original_account = StateWithExtensions::<Account>::unpack(&original_account_data)?;
        let new_escrow = StateWithExtensions::<Account>::unpack(&new_escrow_data)?;
        if new_escrow.base.amount < token_amount {
            return Err(ProgramError::InsufficientFunds);
        }
        (original_account.base.amount, original_mint.base.decimals)
    };
    // Data borrows dropped here — safe for CPI

    // FIRST: Burn original tokens (destroys user's originals)
    burn_original_tokens(original_token_program.clone(), original_account_info.clone(),
        original_mint_info.clone(), original_transfer_authority_info.clone(),
        account_info_iter.as_slice(), token_amount, decimals)?;

    // THEN: Transfer new tokens from escrow to user
    transfer_new_tokens(new_token_program.clone(), new_escrow_info.clone(),
        new_mint_info.clone(), new_account_info.clone(), new_transfer_authority_info.clone(),
        &authority_seeds, token_amount, decimals)?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

V5 - Reentrancy Attacks - MITIGATED
Correct CEI pattern: data borrows dropped before CPIs, original tokens burned FIRST, then new tokens transferred. During transfer CPI, originals are already destroyed. Escrow balance pre-validated.<|eot_id|>

fn pay_creator_fees<'a>(
    metadata_info: &AccountInfo<'a>, size: u64, is_native: bool,
) -> Result<u64, ProgramError> {
    let metadata = try_from_slice_unchecked::<Metadata>(&metadata_info.try_borrow_data()?)?;
    let fees = metadata.data.seller_fee_basis_points;
    let total_fee = (fees as u64) * size / 10000;

    match metadata.data.creators {
        Some(creators) => {
            for creator in creators {
                let creator_fee = creator.share as u64 * total_fee / 100;
                remaining_fee = remaining_fee - creator_fee;

    reserve.liquidity.market_price = market_price;

    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

pub fn process_initialize_mint(
    accounts: &[AccountInfo], decimals: u8,
    mint_authority: &Pubkey, freeze_authority: COption<Pubkey>,
) -> ProgramResult {
    let mint_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    let rent = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;

    let mut mint = Mint::unpack_unchecked(&mint_info.data.borrow())?;
    if mint.is_initialized {
        return Err(TokenError::AlreadyInUse.into());
    }
    if !Rent::from_account_info(rent)?.is_exempt(mint_info.lamports(), Mint::LEN) {
        return Err(TokenError::NotRentExempt.into());
    }

    mint.mint_authority = COption::Some(*mint_authority);
    mint.decimals = decimals;
    mint.is_initialized = true;
    mint.freeze_authority = freeze_authority;
    mint.supply = 0;

    Mint::pack(mint, &mut mint_info.data.borrow_mut())?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V10 - Denial of Service - MITIGATED
Re-initialization prevented (already initialized returns error). Rent exemption enforced prevents garbage-collectible mints. Supply starts at 0 — cannot be pre-inflated.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept is_initialized re-init prevention (L53-55), rent exemption check (L56-58), supply initialized to 0

RecordInstruction::Write { offset, data } => {
    let data_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    let authority_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    {
        let raw_data = &data_info.data.borrow();
        if raw_data.len() < RecordData::WRITABLE_START_INDEX {
            return Err(ProgramError::InvalidAccountData);
        }
        let account_data = bytemuck::try_from_bytes::<RecordData>(
            &raw_data[..RecordData::WRITABLE_START_INDEX],
        ).map_err(|_| ProgramError::InvalidArgument)?;
        if !account_data.is_initialized() {
            return Err(ProgramError::UninitializedAccount);
        }
        check_authority(authority_info, &account_data.authority)?;
    }
    let start = RecordData::WRITABLE_START_INDEX.saturating_add(offset as usize);
    let end = start.saturating_add(data.len());
    if end > data_info.data.borrow().len() {
        Err(ProgramError::AccountDataTooSmall)
    } else {
        data_info.data.borrow_mut()[start..end].copy_from_slice(data);
        Ok(())
    }
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

fn process_init_reserve(
    program_id: &Pubkey, liquidity_amount: u64, config: ReserveConfig,
    accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    if liquidity_amount == 0 {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAmount.into());
    }
    config.validate()?;

    if reserve_info.owner != program_id {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAccountOwner.into());
    }
    if lending_market_info.owner != program_id {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAccountOwner.into());
    }
    if &lending_market.owner != lending_market_owner_info.key {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidMarketOwner.into());
    }
    if !lending_market_owner_info.is_signer {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidSigner.into());
    }
    if &lending_market.oracle_program_id != pyth_product_info.owner {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidOracleConfig.into());
    }

    let lending_market_authority_pubkey =
        Pubkey::create_program_address(authority_signer_seeds, program_id)?;
    if &lending_market_authority_pubkey != lending_market_authority_info.key {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidMarketAuthority.into());
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

pub fn process_swap(
    program_id: &Pubkey, amount_in: u64, minimum_amount_out: u64,
    accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    if swap_info.owner != program_id {
        return Err(ProgramError::IncorrectProgramId);
    }
    let token_swap = SwapVersion::unpack(&swap_info.data.borrow())?;

    if *authority_info.key != Self::authority_id(program_id, swap_info.key, token_swap.bump_seed())? {
        return Err(SwapError::InvalidProgramAddress.into());
    }
    if !(*swap_source_info.key == *token_swap.token_a_account()
        || *swap_source_info.key == *token_swap.token_b_account()) {
        return Err(SwapError::IncorrectSwapAccount.into());
    }
    if *swap_source_info.key == *swap_destination_info.key {
        return Err(SwapError::InvalidInput.into());
    }
    if *pool_mint_info.key != *token_swap.pool_mint() {
        return Err(SwapError::IncorrectPoolMint.into());
    }
    if *pool_fee_account_info.key != *token_swap.pool_fee_account() {
        return Err(SwapError::IncorrectFeeAccount.into());
    }

    if amount_received < minimum_amount_out {
        return Err(SwapError::ExceededSlippage.into());
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

pub fn process_delete(accounts: &[AccountInfo]) -> ProgramResult {
    let name_account = next_account_info(accounts_iter)?;
    let refund_target = next_account_info(accounts_iter)?;

    let source_amount: &mut u64 = &mut name_account.lamports.borrow_mut();
    let dest_amount: &mut u64 = &mut refund_target.lamports.borrow_mut();
    *dest_amount = dest_amount.saturating_add(*source_amount);

fn process_redeem_reserve_collateral(
    program_id: &Pubkey, collateral_amount: u64, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    if collateral_amount == 0 {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAmount.into());
    }
    let lending_market = LendingMarket::unpack(&lending_market_info.data.borrow())?;
    if lending_market_info.owner != program_id {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAccountOwner.into());
    }
    let mut reserve = Reserve::unpack(&reserve_info.data.borrow())?;
    if reserve_info.owner != program_id {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAccountOwner.into());
    }
    if reserve.last_update.is_stale(clock.slot)? {
        return Err(LendingError::ReserveStale.into());
    }
    if &reserve.collateral.supply_pubkey == source_collateral_info.key {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAccountInput.into());
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

fn process_repay_obligation_liquidity(
    program_id: &Pubkey, liquidity_amount: u64, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    if liquidity_amount == 0 {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAmount.into());
    }
    let mut repay_reserve = Reserve::unpack(&repay_reserve_info.data.borrow())?;
    if repay_reserve_info.owner != program_id {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAccountOwner.into());
    }
    if repay_reserve.last_update.is_stale(clock.slot)? {
        return Err(LendingError::ReserveStale.into());
    }
    let mut obligation = Obligation::unpack(&obligation_info.data.borrow())?;
    if obligation.last_update.is_stale(clock.slot)? {
        return Err(LendingError::ObligationStale.into());
    }
    let (liquidity, _) = obligation.find_liquidity_in_borrows(*repay_reserve_info.key)?;
    if liquidity.borrowed_amount_wads == Decimal::zero() {
        return Err(LendingError::ObligationLiquidityEmpty.into());
    }
    let CalculateRepayResult { settle_amount, repay_amount } =
        repay_reserve.calculate_repay(liquidity_amount, liquidity.borrowed_amount_wads)?;
    if repay_amount == 0 {
        return Err(LendingError::RepayTooSmall.into());
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

pub fn process_collect(program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo]) -> ProgramResult {
    let binary_option = BinaryOption::try_from_slice(&binary_option_account_info.data.borrow_mut())?;

    if !binary_option.settled {
        return Err(BinaryOptionError::BetNotSettled.into());
    }
    assert_owned_by(long_token_mint_info, &spl_token::id())?;
    assert_owned_by(short_token_mint_info, &spl_token::id())?;
    assert_keys_equal(collector_long_token_account.owner, *collector_info.key)?;
    assert_keys_equal(collector_short_token_account.owner, *collector_info.key)?;
    assert_keys_equal(*escrow_account_info.key, binary_option.escrow_account_pubkey)?;

    let reward = if collector_long_token_account.mint == binary_option.winning_side_pubkey {
        collector_long_token_account.amount
    } else if collector_short_token_account.mint == binary_option.winning_side_pubkey {
        collector_short_token_account.amount
    } else {
        return Err(BinaryOptionError::TokenNotFoundInPool.into());
    };
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

fn process_deposit_reserve_liquidity(
    program_id: &Pubkey, liquidity_amount: u64, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    let lending_market = LendingMarket::unpack(&lending_market_info.data.borrow())?;
    if lending_market_info.owner != program_id {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAccountOwner.into());
    }
    let mut reserve = Reserve::unpack(&reserve_info.data.borrow())?;
    if &reserve.collateral.supply_pubkey == destination_collateral_info.key {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAccountInput.into());
    }

    // FIRST: Transfer liquidity IN
    spl_token_transfer(TokenTransferParams {
        source: source_liquidity_info.clone(),
        destination: reserve_liquidity_supply_info.clone(),
        amount: liquidity_amount, authority: user_transfer_authority_info.clone(),
        authority_signer_seeds: &[], token_program: token_program_id.clone(),
    })?;

    // THEN: Mint collateral OUT
    let collateral_amount = reserve.deposit_liquidity(liquidity_amount)?;
    Reserve::pack(reserve, &mut reserve_info.data.borrow_mut())?;

    spl_token_mint_to(TokenMintToParams {
        mint: reserve_collateral_mint_info.clone(),
        destination: destination_collateral_info.clone(),
        amount: collateral_amount, authority: lending_market_authority_info.clone(),
        authority_signer_seeds, token_program: token_program_id.clone(),
    })?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks - MITIGATED
Correct CEI: liquidity transferred IN first, then collateral minted OUT. During transfer CPI, no collateral has been minted yet. Self-deposit prevention blocks circular operations.<|eot_id|>

                withdraw_info.clone(), stake_pool.stake_withdraw_bump_seed, fee_tokens)?;

pub fn process_decide(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    let authority_pub_key = Self::authority_id(program_id, pool_account_info.key, pool.bump_seed)?;
    if *authority_account_info.key != authority_pub_key {
        return Err(PoolError::InvalidAuthorityAccount.into());
    }
    if !decider_account_info.is_signer {
        return Err(PoolError::SignatureMissing.into());
    }
    if pool.decider_pubkey != *decider_account_info.key {
        return Err(PoolError::InvalidDeciderAccount.into());
    }

    // FIRST: Update pool state (decision recorded)
    pool.decision = decision;
    pool.serialize(&mut pool_account_info.data.borrow_mut()[..])?;

    // THEN: Mint/burn tokens based on decision via CPI
    if decision > 0 {
        Self::burn(token_program_id_info.clone(), token_pass_mint_info.clone(),
            authority_account_info.clone(), pool.circulation, pool_account_info.key, pool.bump_seed)?;
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

fn process_liquidate_obligation(
    program_id: &Pubkey, liquidity_amount: u64, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    let mut repay_reserve = Reserve::unpack(&repay_reserve_info.data.borrow())?;
    let mut withdraw_reserve = Reserve::unpack(&withdraw_reserve_info.data.borrow())?;
    let mut obligation = Obligation::unpack(&obligation_info.data.borrow())?;

    obligation.accrue_interest(clock.slot)?;
    if obligation.deposited_value == Decimal::zero() {
        return Err(LendingError::ObligationDepositsZero.into());
    }
    if obligation.borrowed_value <= obligation.unhealthy_borrow_value {
        return Err(LendingError::ObligationHealthy.into());
    }

    // FIRST: Repay transfer IN
    spl_token_transfer(TokenTransferParams {
        source: source_liquidity_info.clone(),
        destination: repay_reserve_liquidity_supply_info.clone(),
        amount: repay_amount, ..params
    })?;

    // THEN: Withdraw collateral transfer OUT
    spl_token_transfer(TokenTransferParams {
        source: withdraw_reserve_collateral_supply_info.clone(),
        destination: destination_collateral_info.clone(),
        amount: withdraw_amount, ..signed_params
    })?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

        withdraw_authority_info.clone(), stake_pool.stake_withdraw_bump_seed,
        lamports, transient_stake_info.clone())?;

        withdraw_authority_info.clone(), stake_pool_info.key,

fn process_set_preferred_validator(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
    validator_type: PreferredValidatorType, validator_vote_address: Option<Pubkey>,
) -> ProgramResult {
    check_account_owner(stake_pool_info, program_id)?;
    let mut stake_pool = try_from_slice_unchecked::<StakePool>(&stake_pool_info.data.borrow())?;
    if !stake_pool.is_valid() {
        return Err(StakePoolError::InvalidState.into());
    }
    stake_pool.check_staker(staker_info)?;
    stake_pool.check_validator_list(validator_list_info)?;

    if let Some(vote_address) = validator_vote_address {
        let maybe_validator = validator_list.find(&vote_address);
        if maybe_validator.is_none() {
            return Err(StakePoolError::ValidatorNotFound.into());
        }
    }

    match validator_type {
        PreferredValidatorType::Deposit => stake_pool.preferred_deposit_validator_vote_address = validator_vote_address,
        PreferredValidatorType::Withdraw => stake_pool.preferred_withdraw_validator_vote_address = validator_vote_address,
    }
    stake_pool.serialize(&mut stake_pool_info.data.borrow_mut())?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

pub fn process_freeze_account(program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo]) -> ProgramResult {
    let source_account = Account::unpack(&source_account_info.data.borrow())?;
    if source_account.is_frozen() {
        return Err(TokenError::AccountFrozen.into());
    }
    let mint = Mint::unpack(&mint_info.data.borrow())?;
    match mint.freeze_authority {
        COption::Some(authority) => {
            Self::validate_owner(program_id, &authority, authority_info, account_info_iter.as_slice())?;
        }
        COption::None => return Err(TokenError::MintCannotFreeze.into()),
    }
    if source_account.mint != *mint_info.key {
        return Err(TokenError::MintMismatch.into());
    }

    let mut source_account = Account::unpack(&source_account_info.data.borrow())?;
    source_account.state = AccountState::Frozen;
    Account::pack(source_account, &mut source_account_info.data.borrow_mut())?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V1 - Access Control - MITIGATED
Already-frozen check prevents double-freeze. Mint freeze_authority verified via validate_owner (checks signer). No freeze_authority returns MintCannotFreeze. Mint-account link verified.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

) -> ProgramResult {
    let swap_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;

    if SwapVersion::is_initialized(&swap_info.data.borrow()) {
        return Err(SwapError::AlreadyInUse.into());

    let swap_authority = Pubkey::create_program_address(

        token_program_id,
        token_a: *token_a_info.key,
        token_b: *token_b_info.key,
        pool_mint: *pool_mint_info.key,
        fees,
        swap_curve,

pub fn process_withdraw_governing_tokens(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    if !governing_token_owner_info.is_signer {
        return Err(GovernanceError::GoverningTokenOwnerMustSign.into());
    }

    let _ = transfer_spl_tokens_signed(
        governing_token_holding_info, governing_token_destination_info,
        realm_info, &get_realm_address_seeds(&realm_data.name),
        program_id, token_owner_record_data.governing_token_deposit_amount, spl_token_info);

    token_owner_record_data.governing_token_deposit_amount = 0;
    token_owner_record_data.serialize(&mut token_owner_record_info.data.borrow_mut()[..])?;

            rent.minimum_balance(FeatureProposal::get_packed_len()),

fn process_tally(accounts: &[AccountInfo]) -> ProgramResult {
    match feature_proposal_state {
        FeatureProposal::Pending(acceptance_criteria) => {
            if clock.unix_timestamp >= acceptance_criteria.deadline {
                FeatureProposal::Expired.pack_into_slice(&mut feature_proposal_info.data.borrow_mut());
                return Ok(());
            }
            let acceptance_token = spl_token::state::Account::unpack(&acceptance_token_info.data.borrow())?;
            if acceptance_token.amount < acceptance_criteria.tokens_required {
                return Ok(());
            }

            let _ = invoke_signed(
                &system_instruction::assign(feature_id_info.key, &feature::id()),
                &[feature_id_info.clone(), system_program_info.clone()],
                &[feature_id_signer_seeds]);

            FeatureProposal::Accepted { tokens_upon_acceptance: acceptance_token.amount }
                .pack_into_slice(&mut feature_proposal_info.data.borrow_mut());
        }
        _ => return Err(ProgramError::InvalidAccountData),
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>
